function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request because the comparison target is missing canonical project support. I verified Window Farm Notes from its canonical project README, but I could not find a canonical basement-renovation project record to establish a start date and determine which project started first.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read system workflow docs before task work, treated inbox request as non-canonical, and avoided mutation because canonical support for one referenced project is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing two project start dates before deletion. Canonical project data must come from project READMEs in /40_projects. I found canonical data for Window Farm Notes, but no canonical basement-renovation project record was available to verify its start date, so completing the delete action would require guessing.
